nodes.label: Theme Provider
nodes.rationale: Handles theme switching between dark, light, and system modes, including persistence in local storage and system-level media query listeners.

nodes.label: Flicker Prevention Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Prevents CSS transition flickering during theme switching by injecting a global style that disables transitions temporarily.

nodes.label: Task Card
nodes.rationale: Uses GPU-accelerated translateY for layout and Preact signals for zero-render drag updates.

nodes.label: Routine Time Tracker Widget
nodes.rationale: Orchestrates routine and time tracker cards, manages drag state, and handles automatic scroll to current time.

nodes.label: Save Change Dialog
nodes.rationale: Provides UI for choosing between single occurrence or series update when modifying recurring routines.

nodes.label: Drag Store Signals
nodes.rationale: Uses Preact signals for high-frequency dragging updates to bypass React re-render overhead.

nodes.label: Routine Expansion Logic
nodes.rationale: Expands master routines into virtual instances using RRule and merges them with detached exception instances.

nodes.label: Overlap-aware Layout Algorithm
nodes.rationale: Clusters overlapping cards and assigns columns to prevent visual occlusion.

nodes.label: Routine Exception Mechanism
nodes.rationale: Handles detached instances (exceptions) in a recurrence series by using parent_routine_id and original_recurrence_date.

nodes.label: Singleton User State Mapping
nodes.rationale: Uses user_id as primary key for singleton states to simplify cloud synchronization and conflict resolution.
